endpoints.name: List all recommendations for a subscription.
endpoints.description: List all recommendations for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Reset all recommendation opt-out settings for a subscription.
endpoints.description: Reset all recommendation opt-out settings for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Disables the specified rule so it will not apply to a subscription in the future.
endpoints.description: Disables the specified rule so it will not apply to a subscription in the future.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Get past recommendations for an app, optionally specified by the time range.
endpoints.description: Get past recommendations for an app, optionally specified by the time range.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SITENAME}} with a real sitename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get all recommendations for an app.
endpoints.description: Get all recommendations for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SITENAME}} with a real sitename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Disable all recommendations for an app.
endpoints.description: Disable all recommendations for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SITENAME}} with a real sitename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Reset all recommendation opt-out settings for an app.
endpoints.description: Reset all recommendation opt-out settings for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SITENAME}} with a real sitename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get a recommendation rule for an app.
endpoints.description: Get a recommendation rule for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{SITENAME}} with a real sitename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Disables the specific rule for a web site permanently.
endpoints.description: Disables the specific rule for a web site permanently.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{SITENAME}} with a real sitename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
